item.title: Fiji-Bus-Operators-Association
item.description: Due to the continuing fuel crisis and price hikes, the Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission has announced a determination to approve an interim 5.91 cents fuel surc
item.content:encoded: Due to the continuing fuel crisis and price hikes, the Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission has announced a determination to approve an interim 5.91 cents fuel surc
